conventions.naming_files: PascalCase for components, camelCase for state/hooks
conventions.import_style: relative paths with @grain/types alias for shared types
conventions.styling_approach: Tailwind CSS with custom design tokens (grain-shadow-*, grain-glass-*, etc.)

dark_mode_toggle.summary: Added dark mode support: useTheme hook reads localStorage ('grain-theme') with system-preference fallback, applies/removes 'dark' class on document.documentElement; ThemeToggle renders Sun/Moon icon button with correct aria-label; inserted ThemeToggle between role picker and Sign out in AppHeader; 8 new unit tests all pass.

code.summary: Reverted P4CR data ingestion: deleted p4cr-sources.ts, restored sources/index.ts to the original 6-source configuration, and removed all 22 P4CR claims (CL-0041 through CL-0062) from claims.ts. Last remaining claim is CL-0040.

evidence_panel_backdrop_fix.summary: Removed backdrop overlay div (fixed inset-0 bg-fg/25 backdrop-blur-[2px] z-40) and its enclosing fragment from EvidencePanel. Panel now slides in cleanly with no blur or dim effect behind it. Slide animation, Escape-key close, and × button close are all unchanged.

copy_polish.summary: Applied 8 UX copy changes across 5 source files to align all UI strings with Grain's product voice; updated 3 test files to match new copy strings; all 154 tests passing.

report_section_header_copy_fix.summary: Changed h2 heading 'Top themes' to 'Recurring patterns' in ReportView; updated matching assertions in e2e spec and ReportPage page-object locator.

tab_429_fix.summary: Three-part 429 fix: (1) raised CONCURRENT_MAX from 3 to 10 in rateLimit.ts for multi-tab headroom; (2) added stream.onAbort(release) at top of streamSSE callback in chat.ts so the concurrency slot is freed immediately on client disconnect rather than waiting for TCP close; (3) added clearError() to useChatStream and wired a useEffect in ChatView to call it on activeTabId change, preventing one tab's error banner from bleeding into another tab.

theme_detail_subpage.summary: Created ThemeDetailView at /report/themes/:id with product-chip filtering, CitationCard grid, ProductBar, TrendBadge, loading skeletons, empty state, and not-found guard; made ThemeCard navigate to the detail page on click (keyboard accessible, stopPropagation on claim pills); registered the route in App.tsx; wrote 11 new unit tests and updated ThemeCard tests to wrap in MemoryRouter.

chat_history_ghost_spinner_fix.summary: Fixed stale spinner in history view: StatusTrail now requires isStreaming to show spinner or expanded trail; makeConversationFromHistory trims trailing textless assistant messages before persisting.

login_hero_tag_highlighter_fix.summary: Replaced the shared grain-glass pill className on the three hero tags in LoginView with a per-index tagStyles array; each tag now renders as a semi-transparent highlighter chip (bg-accent/15 text-accent, bg-violet-500/15 text-violet-500, bg-cyan-400/15 text-cyan-400) with rounded-sm, px-2 py-0.5, font-medium, and no grain-glass or border.

login_hero_tag_contrast_fix.summary: Darkened text color on two failing hero tags to meet WCAG 2.1 AA 4.5:1 contrast: 'Role-aware synthesis' text-violet-500 → text-violet-700; 'Trust signals first-class' text-cyan-400 → text-cyan-700. Background opacity classes and the first tag (Cross-product attribution, bg-accent/15 text-accent) are unchanged.

login_hero_tag_colour_token_fix.summary: Added --color-indigo-600 (#4f46e5), --color-violet-600 (#7c3aed), --color-cyan-600 (#0891b2) to grain-theme.css @theme inline block after --color-sky-500 (new lines 63-65). Updated tagStyles in LoginView.tsx to bg-indigo-400/20 text-indigo-600 / bg-violet-500/20 text-violet-600 / bg-cyan-400/20 text-cyan-600 — replacing the previously declared violet-700 and cyan-700 which resolved to black because they were not present in the token registry.

report_subpages.summary: Added GET /api/claims/all backend route, fetchAllClaims API client, converted ReportView StatTile to a react-router Link with hover ChevronRight, created ReportClaimsView / ReportEvidenceView / ReportThemesView subpages, registered three new routes in App.tsx, and wrote 21 unit tests covering all three views.

login_logo_gradient_polish.summary: Added `in oklch` colour interpolation to .grain-gradient-brand (line 155) and .grain-gradient-text (line 173); rebalanced middle stop from 55%→50% and 60%→50% respectively. No other rules or files touched.

login_gradient_text_richness.summary: Expanded .grain-gradient-text from 3 stops to 4 stops: accent 0%, color-mix(accent 60% accent-2) 30%, accent-2 65%, accent-3 100%. Accent (indigo) now holds intensity through the first third before blending into violet; violet-to-cyan finish is unchanged. No .tsx files or other CSS rules touched.

login_logo_gradient_brand_4stop.summary: Expanded .grain-gradient-brand from 3 stops to 4 stops matching .grain-gradient-text structure: accent 0%, color-mix(in oklch, accent 60%, accent-2) 30%, accent-2 65%, accent-3 100%. Angle (135deg) and interpolation method (in oklch) unchanged. .grain-gradient-brand-soft and .grain-gradient-text untouched. No .tsx files modified.

multi_tab_streaming_architecture.summary: Redesigned chat to give each tab its own independent stream: removed top-level history from session store, added per-tab appendMessageToTab/updateLastAssistantInTab/trimLastPhantomMessage actions, bumped persist version to 3 with v2 migration, scoped useChatStream to a tabId param, extracted ChatPane component (hidden-not-unmounted per tab), slimmed ChatView to a container that renders one ChatPane per tab.
multi_tab_streaming_architecture.test_results: 192 passing, 1 pre-existing failure (EvidencePanel backdrop div was removed in evidence_panel_backdrop_fix session but test still asserts its presence)

gitignore_audit.summary: Removed critical tests/ blanket exclusion; added Playwright run-output directories (tests/visual/findings/, tests/visual/test-results/), OS/editor artefacts, extended log patterns, linter caches, and package-lock.json (npm artefact in a pnpm project). .ux-workflow/ intentionally left tracked.

secrets_remediation.summary: Replaced real Perforce employee email addresses (isathe@perforce.com, pm@perforce.com) with example.com equivalents across all fixtures, tests, and dev prefills. Replaced personal macOS path in .env.example CLAUDE_BIN with generic placeholder 'claude'. Replaced named-person comment in LoginView with neutral dev-only notice.

critical: C-1: All data API endpoints (/api/claims/*, /api/reports/*, /api/sources/*) are unauthenticated — OWASP API1:2023, A01:2021
C-2: X-Forwarded-For header trusted blindly in rateLimit.ts, defeating per-IP rate limiting — CWE-290, OWASP API4:2023
major: M-1: apps/web/tsconfig.app.json does not extend tsconfig.base.json — missing strict, noUncheckedIndexedAccess, noImplicitOverride
M-2: GET /api/claims?ids= has no bounds on number of IDs in batch — OWASP API4:2023
M-3: windows Map in rateLimit.ts grows without bound (memory leak under unique-IP load)
M-4: Single Zustand store at 352 lines handles 4 unrelated concern domains — violates Single Responsibility
M-5: No code splitting in App.tsx — all 9 view components imported eagerly, no React.lazy
M-6: CI pr.yml runs pnpm lint (allows 4 baseline ESLint errors) not pnpm lint:ci (zero tolerance)
minor: m-1: @grain/types package.json exports TypeScript source, not compiled output — non-publishable pattern
m-2: SSEEvent type in sse.ts missing status variant — protocol type is incomplete
m-3: retrieve() uses Date.now() for recency scoring — non-deterministic in tests
m-4: POST /api/auth/login accepts client-supplied role, not role from user record — A01:2021
m-5: LoginView.tsx hardcodes isathe@perforce.com in source code — PII in source
m-6: history IS persisted to localStorage — contradicts GRAIN_OVERVIEW.md documentation
m-7: No React Error Boundary in App.tsx — any render error crashes full React tree
m-8: ChatStreamEvent shared type unused by both emitter (chat.ts) and consumer (useChatStream.ts)
m-9: No Content-Security-Policy or security headers configured — OWASP A05:2021
advisory: A-1: Tab.messages and history are dual sources of truth for active conversation content
A-2: In-memory concurrency state not shared across processes — pre-deployment blocker for multi-process
A-3: Non-deterministic retrieval in integration tests due to Date.now() recency scoring
A-4: MODULE_MAP.md documents CONCURRENT_MAX=1 but implementation is CONCURRENT_MAX=10
